title: Implement plugin lifecycle hooks
description: Plugin system declared in plugins.ts but dormant. Wire up onProfileCreate, onLaunch, onLimitReached hooks.

context.text: Plugin lifecycle hooks wired up: onLaunch, onProfileCreate, onLimitReached. Error isolation with try/catch. 564-line test suite.

acceptanceCriteria: Hooks called at correct lifecycle points
Plugin errors dont crash the main CLI
